position.title: Your spot in line
position.subtitle: We'll email you as soon as a unit opens up. Nothing else to do right now.
position.error: We couldn't load your waitlist position. Try again in a moment.

faster_list.title: Three ways to move up the list
faster_list.subtitle: If any of these apply to you, you may qualify for priority placement. We'll review your documents and confirm in 3–5 business days.

referral.title: Government agency referral
referral.body: Referrals from HUD, county housing, or another approved agency move you to the priority pool.

veteran.title: Veteran preference
veteran.body: Veterans and surviving spouses qualify under HUD 4350.3 for preference placement.

hardship.title: Emergency hardship
hardship.body: Currently homeless, fleeing domestic violence, or displaced by disaster — your application is fast-tracked.

magic_link_sent.title: Check your inbox
magic_link_sent.body: We sent a magic link to {{email}}. Tap the link to finish your application.
magic_link_sent.resend_sent: Sent. Check your spam folder too.
